phdOffers.title: PhD in Finance (PhD-FIN) — Fall 2026
phdOffers.subject: Doctoral research in finance with UAE/GCC focus; corporate finance, financial markets, econometrics
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Graduate assistantships (tuition waiver + monthly stipend) available via admission application; competitive selection by department
phdOffers.notes: Assistantship deadline (May 28) passed; non-assistantship Fall 2026 PhD deadline July 23, 2026 still open as of verification date. Requires master's in finance/MBA or related field, GRE/GMAT, graduate econometrics.

phdOffers.title: PhD in Business Administration — Finance Concentration (Fall 2026)
phdOffers.subject: Finance-focused doctoral training in business administration; research methods, qualifying exam, dissertation
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Graduate assistantships available on admission application; English-medium program

supervisors.name: School of Business Administration Graduate Admissions

phdOffers.notes: Finance concentration within PhD-BA. Same July 23, 2026 deadline for applicants not requesting assistantship.

phdOffers.title: Doctor of Philosophy — School of Business (Finance research areas)
phdOffers.subject: PhD research in Accounting, Finance, Economics, Management, Marketing; finance priorities include Sustainable Finance, FinTech, Behavioural Finance, Applied Finance
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Competitive admission; contact admissions for scholarship/stipend availability; tuition-funded unless award granted
phdOffers.notes: Applications open May 1, 2026; deadline Aug 20, 2026 09:00. Requires master's in business-related field, GPA ≥3.3/4.0, IELTS 6.5. Finance discipline explicitly listed.

phdOffers.institution: University of Dubai — Dubai Business School
phdOffers.title: Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) — Applied Business Research
phdOffers.subject: Applied business doctoral research aligned with UAE/GCC economic development; finance, governance, and management topics
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Program fee approx. AED 270,000 total per catalog; limited cohort (max 12); no guaranteed scholarship on official regulations
phdOffers.notes: Official regulations: applications accepted January through mid-September each year. Listed as open for 2026 cohort; funding primarily self-funded — included for UAE coverage; verify 2026-27 key dates with program office.

phdOffers.title: International PhD — Management Engineering (Spring 2027)
phdOffers.subject: Doctoral research in economics, finance, marketing, accounting, strategy, IT management, production/operations
phdOffers.fundingDetails: KAIST International Graduate Scholarship (KGPS/KPS): full tuition, health insurance, monthly stipend (KRW 1,000,000 MS track / KRW 300,000 PhD KPS per official scholarship page); auto-considered on application
phdOffers.notes: Spring 2027 international window Aug 18–Sep 1, 2026. Management Engineering offers MS, MS-PhD integrated, and PhD. English-friendly Seoul campus.

phdOffers.institution: KAIST — College of Business (Finance MBA / PhD pathway)
phdOffers.title: International PhD — Finance MBA Track (Spring 2027)
phdOffers.subject: Finance-focused doctoral studies within KAIST College of Business; quantitative finance and management engineering crossover
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Eligible for KAIST Scholarship (tuition + stipend + insurance) and KGPS/KPS prestige awards per admission.kaist.ac.kr
phdOffers.notes: Finance MBA listed with PhD degree option on KAIST explore-programs page. Same Spring 2027 application window.

phdOffers.title: International PhD — Management Engineering (Fall 2027 Early Track)
phdOffers.subject: Doctoral research in finance, accounting, economics, strategy; English-track international admission
phdOffers.fundingDetails: KAIST International Graduate Scholarship auto-considered; full tuition and stipend per official financial support pages
phdOffers.notes: Fall Early admission typically early–late December per KAIST yearly timeline; exact Fall 2027 dates TBA but cycle pattern confirmed. Deadline placeholder end-Dec 2026.

phdOffers.institution: Seoul National University — SNU Business School
phdOffers.title: PhD in Business Administration (anticipated Fall 2027 intake)
phdOffers.subject: Doctoral training in finance, management, marketing, strategy; all admitted PhD students receive financial aid up to five years per SNU BS policy
phdOffers.fundingDetails: SNU Business School: all admitted PhD students meeting academic requirements receive financial aid up to 5 years (per cba.snu.ac.kr admissions page)
phdOffers.notes: Spring 2027 window closed July 9, 2026. Fall 2027 international graduate guide not yet published; deadline estimated from historical Fall SPF pattern (early March). Monitor en.snu.ac.kr/admission.

phdOffers.institution: NIIED Global Korea Scholarship (GKS-G) — Embassy Track
phdOffers.title: GKS-G Embassy Track PhD (2027 intake) — Business/Finance at Korean universities
phdOffers.subject: Government-funded doctoral study at participating Korean universities (KAIST, SNU, Korea U, Yonsei business/economics departments)
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Full tuition, monthly stipend, settlement allowance, Korean language training, airfare per GKS-G guidelines
phdOffers.notes: 2026 GKS-G embassy window closed Feb 25, 2026. 2027 cycle expected Feb 2027 per NIIED historical schedule. Greece eligible via European country list in SK scholarship guides.

phdOffers.title: MEXT Research Student Scholarship 2027 (Economics / Business Administration / Accounting)
phdOffers.subject: Embassy-track funded research-student pathway leading to master's or doctoral degrees in finance, economics, business administration, or accounting at Japanese universities
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Monthly stipend (approx. ¥143,000–145,000 research student), tuition exemption, airfare; fields include Economics, Business Administration, Accounting/Financial Economics

supervisors.name: Embassy of Japan in Greece (MEXT contact)

phdOffers.notes: Embassy deadlines vary by country; Greece announcement April 2026. Some missions close May–June; verify gr.emb-japan.go.jp. Field codes include Business Administration and Accounting. English-taught program + host professor required.

phdOffers.institution: Keio University — Graduate School of Economics
phdOffers.title: Doctoral Program in Economics (April 2027 intake)
phdOffers.subject: Doctoral economics research including monetary economics, finance, public economics, econometrics
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Privately financed admission; MEXT university/embassy routes and Keio scholarships may apply post-admission. English proficiency required.
phdOffers.notes: Application Dec 14–24, 2026 for April/September 2027 intakes per official schedule table.

phdOffers.institution: Waseda University — Graduate School of Commerce
phdOffers.title: Doctoral Program — Graduate School of Commerce (April 2027)
phdOffers.subject: Doctoral research in commerce, accounting, finance, management; English-based doctoral admissions available
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Scholarship for Fostering Researchers in Doctoral Programs: ¥400,000/year for GSC; MEXT and Waseda scholarships post-enrollment
phdOffers.notes: Second admission round Nov 9–16, 2026 for April 2027 enrollment per official doctorate schedule.

phdOffers.institution: Waseda University — Graduate School of Economics
phdOffers.title: Doctor of Economics — English-based Program (April 2027)
phdOffers.subject: Doctoral economics/finance research; English-based program with September/April entry
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Doctoral researcher scholarship ¥400,000/year (GSE); additional MEXT/Waseda awards after enrollment
phdOffers.notes: April intake application period historically mid-December (Dec 11–18 pattern from AY2026 schedule). Confirm AY2027 guide when published.

phdOffers.institution: Waseda University — Graduate School of Asia-Pacific Studies (GSAPS)
phdOffers.title: PhD — International Political Economy & Development (April 2027)
phdOffers.subject: English-based PhD in international political economy, development finance, governance, and Asia-Pacific economic policy
phdOffers.fundingDetails: MEXT scholarship admissions category available; Waseda doctoral researcher grants post-enrollment
phdOffers.notes: April 2027 guide released June 26, 2026. Application mid-August to early September 2026 per GSAPS standard schedule.

phdOffers.institution: Osaka University — Osaka School of International Public Policy (OSIPP)
phdOffers.title: Doctoral Program — International & Comparative Public Policy (April 2027)
phdOffers.subject: Doctoral research in public policy, economic governance, fiscal policy, and international finance/regulation
phdOffers.fundingDetails: MEXT embassy/university routes available; standard doctoral tuition; English proficiency required at master's graduate level
phdOffers.notes: Winter round Nov 19–26, 2026 for April 2027 enrollment. Summer round closed June 4, 2026.

phdOffers.institution: Hitotsubashi University — Graduate School of Business Administration (HUB)
phdOffers.title: Doctor of Philosophy in Finance (English-capable doctoral program)
phdOffers.subject: Doctoral commerce/finance research; PhD in Finance degree listed on JPCUP institutional profile
phdOffers.fundingDetails: MEXT scholarship (¥156,000/month PhD level per Hitotsubashi MEXT page); ICS DBA/HUB scholarships for full-time students

supervisors.name: Graduate School of Business Administration Office

phdOffers.notes: PhD in Finance listed on official NIAD-JPCUP profile. ICS DBA rounds for 2026-27 closed; next HUB/ICS cycle expected autumn 2026. MEXT and research-student pathways remain viable. TOEFL/IELTS required.

phdOffers.institution: International University of Japan — Graduate School of International Relations
phdOffers.title: PhD in International Relations (Fall 2027) — Economics & Policy
phdOffers.subject: English-only doctoral program; international political economy, development finance, trade and macroeconomic policy
phdOffers.fundingDetails: S. Nakayama Memorial Scholarship (30–100% tuition + up to ¥100,000/month for premium); MEXT university recommendation possible
phdOffers.notes: Next application deadline Nov 17, 2026 for Fall 2027 entry per three-round annual schedule. All-English campus; scholarship application submitted with admission.

phdOffers.title: SNU President Fellowship PhD — Spring 2027 (document submission window)
phdOffers.subject: Fully funded PhD for faculty/instructional staff from developing countries; business/economics departments eligible
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Full tuition 6 semesters, KRW 1.5–2.0M/month stipend, round-trip airfare, health insurance, Korean language training

supervisors.name: SNU Office of Global Affairs — Scholarship Manager

phdOffers.notes: Online admission+SPF checkbox closed July 9, 2026. Physical/document submission for SPF applicants still open until July 31, 2026 per Spring 2027 guidelines. Restricted to teaching staff from developing countries without prior PhD.
